home.step1: Install MobileFlow App on your phone
home.step2: Open App, enter IP and password
agent.title: AI Agent Management
dialog.addAgent.title: Add Custom Agent
dialog.addAgent.name: Name (unique ID)
apiKey.title: API Key Configuration
apiKey.hint: Keys are stored locally in .env file. Never uploaded to any server.
logs.title: Logs
settings.title: Settings
runConfig.title: Configurations
runConfig.selectOrCreate: Select a configuration or click + to create one.
runConfig.name: Name
runConfig.terminalHint: — Select a configuration and click Run —
conn.title: Connection Modes
conn.certGenerated: ✓ Certificate generated and paths filled automatically.
conn.helpDesc: Tunnel creates a TLS-encrypted WebSocket (WSS) server on your computer, allowing your phone to connect securely over any network — even across the internet.
conn.helpQuickDesc: Click "Generate Certificate" to auto-create a self-signed certificate. Set a Bearer Token as your password, then click Save & Apply.
conn.helpManual2: Or use a CA-signed certificate (Let's Encrypt, etc.) for production
conn.helpManual3: Fill in the absolute paths to your cert and key files below
conn.helpSecurity1: Self-signed certs are fine for home/office networks. Not recommended for public internet.
conn.helpSecurity2: Bearer Token is required — it authenticates your phone to the Agent.
conn.helpSecurity3: For public internet: use Cloudflare Tunnel (free, no cert needed) or a CA-signed certificate (Let's Encrypt).
conn.helpSecurity4: Private keys are stored in ~/.mobileflow/certs/ with restricted permissions.
conn.regenConfirm: Certificate already exists. Regenerating will disconnect current sessions and invalidate the old token. Continue?
backend.nameConflict: Name '%{name}' conflicts with a built-in Agent
backend.commandNotFound: Command '%{command}' not found. Please verify it is installed and in PATH.
backend.wslNotInstalled: WSL is not installed. Cannot use Linux paths.
backend.npmNotFound: npm not detected. Please install Node.js first.
backend.installTimeout: %{name} install timed out. Please check your network.
backend.noCliInstalled: Please install an AI Agent in Settings first
backend.authRequired: Authentication required to use this Agent
backend.authFailed: Authentication failed, please check credentials and retry
backend.cannotStartBrowserLogin: Cannot start browser login, please try API Key method
backend.uninstallNotSupported: This Agent does not support automatic uninstall
backend.fileAlreadyExists: A %{kind} with the same name already exists: %{name}
backend.renameTargetExists: A file with the same name already exists: %{name}
backend.pluginDirDeleteFailed: Failed to delete plugin directory, please manually delete %{path}
backend.pluginNoConfig: This plugin does not support custom configuration
backend.pluginNoConfigSchema: This plugin has no configSchema declared, configuration not accepted
backend.configValidationFailed: Configuration validation failed, please check the issues below
backend.configSchemaError: Plugin's config schema definition is invalid, please contact the plugin author
backend.addProjectFirst: Please add a project in Settings first
backend.cliNotFoundInstall: CLI not found: %{name}, please install in Settings
backend.agentConnectionFailed: Agent connection error, recovery failed. Please restart Agent.
backend.retryFailed: Agent connection error, multiple retries failed. Please restart Agent.
backend.cliCannotStart: ❌ CLI cannot start (command not found or environment misconfigured). Please check Agent settings.
backend.cliStartFailed: ❌ CLI start failed. Please check installation and authentication. You can reinstall or switch Agent in Settings.
backend.fileTooLarge: File too large (%{size} MB), exceeds 2MB limit. Cannot open in editor.
backend.pywinptyWarning: ⚠️ Interactive mode unavailable, recommend installing pywinpty
backend.startupSlow10s: Startup is taking longer than usual, please wait...
backend.startupSlow20s: Still starting, may need to download dependencies...
